title: World economic highlights of 2023
bodyText:
BUSINESS NEWS - With infrastructure being unstable and food prices ever increasing, many South Africans are concerned about the country’s economic trends.


> Sanisha Packirisamy, Economist at Momentum Investments, and Herman van Papendorp, Head of Investment Research & Asset Allocation at Momentum Investments have unpacked the biggest influences in world economies for 2023 in an easy-to-follow infographic with highlights, forecasts and Indices summary.
